title: Infosys and ATP Launch AI Chatbot Ally and Extend Partnership Through 2028
detailed_summary: Infosys and ATP launched Ally, an AI-powered chatbot for tennis fan engagement, powered by Infosys Topaz and integrated with the ATP Stats Centre. The companies also extended their partnership through 2028. The release highlights Infosys’s AI and digital innovation work with ATP but provides no deal value, revenue impact, or financial guidance.
